name: sourcerAgent
title: Sourcer Agent
description: Translates a fresh NEW_JOB_REQUISITION event into a candidate shortlist by combining the RoboHire mock MCP server (sample candidate database) with the real RoboHire REST API for resume + JD parsing and scoring.

tool_use.name: skills.list_skills
tool_use.description: Discover available skills.

tool_use.name: skills.load_skill
tool_use.description: Load a skill's body by name.

tool_use.name: robohireHealthApi
tool_use.description: Real RoboHire GET /api/v1/health — smoke test connectivity.

tool_use.name: parseJdApi
tool_use.description: Real RoboHire POST /api/v1/parse-jd — structures a job description.

tool_use.name: parseResumeApi
tool_use.description: Real RoboHire POST /api/v1/parse-resume — structures a resume.

tool_use.name: matchResumeApi
tool_use.description: Real RoboHire POST /api/v1/match-resume — REQUIRES {resume, jd} strings.

tool_use.name: robohire-mcp.search_candidates
tool_use.description: Mock candidate-pool search (3 deterministic samples).

tool_use.name: robohire-mcp.score_resume
tool_use.description: Mock scoring fallback when matchResumeApi is unavailable.

tool_use.name: robohire-mcp.get_job_requisition
tool_use.description: Fetch a requisition (jr_001, jr_002 pre-seeded) from the mock pool.

actions.name: planCandidateSearch
actions.description: Plan + execute the candidate search and emit a shortlist as the final JSON answer.

name: screenerAgent
title: Screener Agent
description: Re-ranks the sourced shortlist using the real RoboHire match-resume API plus the resume-screening skill, and generates interview invitations for the top hits.

tool_use.name: skills.list_skills
tool_use.description: Discover available skills.

tool_use.name: skills.load_skill
tool_use.description: Load a skill's body by name.

tool_use.name: matchResumeApi
tool_use.description: Real RoboHire POST /api/v1/match-resume — scores resume against JD.

tool_use.name: inviteCandidateApi
tool_use.description: Real RoboHire POST /api/v1/invite-candidate — generates interview email.

tool_use.name: robohire-mcp.score_resume
tool_use.description: Mock scoring fallback.

tool_use.name: robohire-mcp.get_job_requisition
tool_use.description: Refetch requisition if missing from payload.

actions.name: screenCandidates
actions.description: Load the resume-screening skill, score every candidate, emit ranked list with optional invite drafts.

name: matcherAgent
title: Matcher Agent
description: Subscribes to MATCH_REQUESTED. Loads the resume-screening skill, then calls the live RoboHire matchResumeApi to analyze the resume against the JD. Emits MATCH_COMPLETED with the upstream's structured analysis verbatim so downstream agents can act on it without re-fetching.

tool_use.name: skills.list_skills
tool_use.description: Discover available skills.

tool_use.name: skills.load_skill
tool_use.description: Load a skill's body by name.

tool_use.name: robohireHealthApi
tool_use.description: Real RoboHire GET /api/v1/health — smoke test connectivity.

tool_use.name: matchResumeApi
tool_use.description: Real RoboHire POST /api/v1/match-resume — REQUIRES {resume, jd} strings.

actions.name: matchAndAnalyze
actions.description: Load the resume-screening skill, then call matchResumeApi against the live RoboHire API.

name: inviterAgent
title: Inviter Agent
description: Subscribes to MATCH_COMPLETED. If the match verdict is Strong Match, calls the live RoboHire inviteCandidateApi to generate an interview-invitation email body. Emits INVITE_GENERATED with the generated email (or a `skipped` envelope when the verdict was below the bar).

tool_use.name: inviteCandidateApi
tool_use.description: Real RoboHire POST /api/v1/invite-candidate — generates interview email.

actions.name: generateInvite
actions.description: Read the match analysis; if score ≥ 80, call inviteCandidateApi; otherwise emit skipped envelope.
